title: Less Annoying Phantoms
description: Makes Phantoms less annoying with unique changes
body:
![Less Annoying Phantoms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af41ddd9fb57c8fbc41d496a987eec2c616bbb2a.png)

Phantoms are a very cool idea for a mob. However, their coolness is often overwritten by how annoying they are, and their uncapitalized potential.

### **Changes**
- Phantoms deal no Knockback
  - For me this was the most annoying thing about them so I made sure to tweak this
  - Note: Phantoms can still kind of push the player, but their hits do no knockback
- Phantoms vanish when they are hit or when they hit you
- Phantoms deal more damage (Because they disapear when hit)
- Phantoms give the player weakness when they hit

I tried to keep the phantoms balanced while making them easier to deal with and less annoying, and more like the hallucinatory creatures they are meant to be.
